daily.today_energy: Your vibe is crystalline clarity mixed with creative restlessness. The universe is basically asking you to trust your gut while staying open to plot twists. Channel that indecisive Libra energy into curiosity instead of overthinking.
daily.love: Someone's been thinking about you more than you realize. Whether it's romantic or platonic, the energy around connection is *chef's kiss* today. Don't ghost your own good vibes by playing it too cool.
daily.career: Your ideas are hitting different right now. This is the moment to pitch that thing you've been workshopping in the group chat. Your voice deserves to be heard, and honestly, people are more receptive than usual.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement and sunlight more than wellness drinks right now. A walk, some dancing, whatever gets you outside and embodied. Your nervous system will thank you for the reset.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is all about reclaiming your space, Libra. The cosmos is nudging you toward authenticity over people-pleasing. Trust the subtle shifts happening behind the scenes—they're setting up something good.
weekly.love: Vulnerability is your superpower right now. Whether you're single or coupled up, showing your real self (messy parts included) creates real connections. Someone's noticing your energy shift.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different this week. Don't sleep on that creative spark—jot it down, sketch it out, share it. Your unique perspective is exactly what's needed. The recognition might surprise you.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentleness over intensity. Think nourishing moves that feel good rather than punishing ones. Rest isn't laziness; it's you honoring what you actually need right now.
